message:
fix(serve): Update pipeline API for new validation interface

Adapts pipeline HTTP handlers to updated pipeline package interface:

- Use Workflow.Name instead of deprecated ID field in logging
- Replace direct CancelFn() call with pipeline.CancelPipeline()
- Update ParseYAML to ParseString with explicit format argument
- Adjust validation error/warning field mappings (add hint, remove step_id)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
